chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-1011 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A /17 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A /17 4. For hearing. 15.11.2017 Mr. Ghulamullah Chang, Advocate for applicants alongwith applicants. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted. 4. Learned Counsel for applicants submits that the applicants have been falsely implicated in the present case, however, want to surrender before the concerned Sessions Court to seek pre-arrest bail in accordance with law but they apprehend their imminent arrest at the hands of police at the instance of complainant party. He also submits that protective bail may be granted to the applicants in order to enable them to surrender before the concerned Court. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants are admitted to protective bail for a period of 08 days from today subject to their furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 08 days on 22.11.2017 or on surrender of the applicants before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. The bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
